Demos and Talks

2025

  • Browser automation/testing with BiDi and minimal dependencies (Martin Pitt), devconf.cz; intro and demo code, video

2024

  • Upstream cross-project testing: Never break your API consumers (Martin Pitt), devconf.cz; video, slides and notes
  • How we integrated Btrfs in Cockpit (Jelle van der Waa), devconf.cz; video, slides

2023

  • Monty Python’s Flying Cockpit (Allison Karlitskaya and Martin Pitt), devconf.cz; video, slides and notes

2022

  • Tame your CI with Error Budgets (Stef Walter and Martin Pitt); DevConf.cz page with slides and notes links
  • (Mostly) Self-testing infrastructure updates (Martin Pitt, Cyborg Infrastructure Seminar)

2021

  • Cockpit CI infrastructure overview (Sanne Raymaekers and Martin Pitt, Cyborg Infrastructure Seminar)
  • Using the new metrics page to debug performance issues (Matej Marusak)

2020

  • Authenticate to Cockpit from anywhere (slides, notes) (Martin Pitt, DevConf.cz)

2019

  • Your-turn key Cockpit UI in a CICD ecosystem (slides with notes, slide sources) (Martin Pitt, DevConf.cz)
  • Set up Smart Card authentication with Cockpit 209 (Martin Pitt)

2018

  • Cockpit - Moving towards more advanced use-cases (Lars Karlitski, Andreas Nilsson, DevConf.cz)
  • Cockpit: A Linux Sysadmin Session in your Browser (Stef Walter, FOSDEM)
  • Is Cockpit Secure? (blog post) (Stef Walter, All Systems Go)

2016

  • Cockpit: A Linux Session In Your Browser (Peter Volpe, FOSDEM)
  • What’s new and what’s next (Peter Volpe, Dominik Perpeet, DevConf.cz)
